goal: Add a side-effect-free plan for a future read-only cockpit live model adapter that can append accepted Live AICOS card evidence to a cockpit model without route wiring, renderer changes, runtime actions, or executable controls.
scope_out: Do not change cockpit route, renderer, server mount, runtime route, provider, DB, package, workflow, or deployment files.
Do not make cockpit actions executable.
claims: Accepted Live AICOS cards can be represented as a future read-only cockpit panel.
Adapter planning remains separate from route wiring.
assumptions: BPK-024 has already decided live source readiness.
A later contract may implement the adapter or wire it to the route.
dod: The plan builds a read-only planned model only when decision and network result are ready.
Missing adapter reference requires review and blocked decisions block the plan.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Route wiring, renderer changes, runtime changes, provider calls, DB calls, package changes, or executable cockpit actions become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-024 decided live model source readiness. BPK-028 may plan a future adapter without wiring it.
